overview: Premium luxury 3D website for Yakshi Makeup & Nail Studio — a celebrity bridal makeup artist based in Delhi NCR. Features a dark gold theme with advanced 3D animations, floating particles, glassmorphism cards, celebrity portfolio, Indian testimonials, services showcase, FAQ, WhatsApp & Instagram floating buttons, and an embedded map.
features: Full 3D animated hero with floating particles and rose petals
Celebrity makeup artist showcase with portfolio gallery
Bridal & nail art services section with 3D card effects
Indian client testimonials with animated carousel
Why Choose Us with animated 3D cards
Dark luxury theme with gold glow effects and glassmorphism
All 10 portfolio photos displayed across sections
